use serde::Deserialize;
use std::fs;
use std::io::Read;

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Manifest {
    package: Package,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Package {
    name: String,
    version: String,
}

const MAX_MANIFEST_SIZE: u64 = 1024 * 1024;

fn parse_manifest(path: &str) -> Result<Manifest, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let file = fs::File::open(path)?;
    let metadata = file.metadata()?;
    if metadata.len() > MAX_MANIFEST_SIZE {
        return Err("manifest file too large".into());
    }
    let mut reader = std::io::BufReader::new(file);
    let mut data = String::new();
    reader.read_to_string(&mut data)?;
    let manifest: Manifest = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(manifest)
}

fn parse_manifest_with_limit(path: &str, max_bytes: usize) -> Result<Manifest, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let mut file = fs::File::open(path)?;
    let mut data = String::with_capacity(max_bytes.min(4096));
    let bytes_read = file.take(max_bytes as u64).read_to_string(&mut data)?;
    if bytes_read >= max_bytes {
        return Err("manifest exceeds size limit".into());
    }
    let manifest: Manifest = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(manifest)
}
